info.name: Local Service Marketplace - All Services
info.description:
Complete API documentation for all microservices including the API Gateway.

**Base URL (via API Gateway):** `{{base_url}}` = `http://localhost:3700/api/v1`

**Auth:** Most endpoints require a Bearer JWT token. Use the Login request and the collection will auto-save the token.

**Services & Direct Ports:**
- api-gateway: 3700
- identity-service: 3001
- marketplace-service: 3003
- payment-service: 3006
- comms-service: 3007
- oversight-service: 3010

item.name: ï¿½ Auth â€” 2FA (Two-Factor Authentication)
item.description:
Two-factor authentication endpoints.

âš ï¸ FUTURE FEATURE â€” Routes not yet implemented in auth-service. Add to AuthController when building 2FA support.

Recommended library: `otplib` (TOTP) + `qrcode` for QR generation.

item.name: ðŸ–¥ï¸ Auth â€” Session & Device Management
item.description:
Active session and trusted device management.

âš ï¸ FUTURE FEATURE â€” Routes not yet implemented. Sessions table exists in auth-service DB schema.

Requires reading from `sessions` table with user_id filter.

item.name: ðŸ’¼ Auth â€” Account Management
item.description:
Account security and lifecycle management.

âš ï¸ FUTURE FEATURE â€” Routes not yet implemented.

- Change password requires current password verification
- Account deletion should be soft-delete with 30-day grace period

item.name: ðŸ”— Auth â€” Social Account Linking
item.description:
Link/unlink social providers to an existing account (separate from OAuth login).

âš ï¸ FUTURE FEATURE â€” Routes not yet implemented. `social_accounts` table already exists in the DB schema.

Allows one user to have both email/password AND Google/Facebook auth.

item.name: ðŸª„ Auth â€” Magic Link (Passwordless)
item.description:
Email-based passwordless login via one-time magic links.

âš ï¸ FUTURE FEATURE â€” Routes not yet implemented.

Flow: user enters email â†’ receives email with link â†’ clicks link â†’ gets JWT token.

item.name: ðŸŽ Auth â€” Apple Sign In
item.description:
Apple OAuth for web and mobile (required for iOS apps).

âš ï¸ FUTURE FEATURE â€” Routes not yet implemented. Requires Apple Developer account and `passport-apple` or `apple-signin-auth` npm package.
